zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Lawrence Berkeley於1387年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆時，他的父親John Berkeley III27歲，母親Isabel Clifford25歲。他於1404年2月之前與Joan Woodford在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1458年5月20日在法國曼恩普拉瑟享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Lawrence Berkeley于1387年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆时，他的父亲John Berkeley III27岁，母亲Isabel Clifford25岁。他于1404年2月之前与Joan Woodford在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1458年5月20日在法国曼恩普拉瑟享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Lawrence Berkeley was born in 1387, in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England, his father, John Berkeley III, was 27 and his mother, Isabel Clifford, was 25. He married Joan Woodford before February 1404, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 20 May 1458, in Placé, Maine, France, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Lawrence Berkeley est né en 1387, à Wymondham, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Berkeley III, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabel Clifford, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan Woodford avant février 1404, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 20 mai 1458, à Placé, Maine, France, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Lawrence Berkeley 1387 in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Berkeley III 27 und seine Mutter Isabel Clifford 25. Er hat vor Februar 1404 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England Joan Woodford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Mai 1458 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Placé, Maine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Lawrence Berkeley è nato il nel 1387 nel Wymondham, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, John Berkeley III, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Clifford, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan Woodford prima del febbraio 1404, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 maggio 1458, nel Placé, Maine, Francia, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリー
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Lawrence Berkeleyが1387年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウイモンドハムで生まれた時，父John Berkeley IIIは27歳，母Isabel Cliffordは25歳であった。1404年2月以前にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーでJoan Woodfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1458年5月20日にフランスメインプラクeで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Lawrence Berkeley(이)가 1387년 영국 레이스스터실르 윈이몽함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Berkeley III(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Clifford(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1404년 2월 이전 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 Joan Woodford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1458년 5월 20일 프랑스 맹 플라ce에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Wymondham, Leicestershire, England, Unit: Wymondham, Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Lawrence Berkeley nasceu em 1387, em Wymondham, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Berkeley III, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Clifford, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Woodford antes fevereiro de 1404, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de maio de 1458, em Placé, Maine, França, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Lawrence Berkeley родился в 1387 г. в местности вимондхам, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Berkeley III было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Clifford, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Woodford перед февраль 1404 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 20 мая 1458 г. в местности плакe, меин, Франция в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Lawrence Berkeley nació en 1387, en Wymondham, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Berkeley III, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Isabel Clifford, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joan Woodford antes de febrero de 1404, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de mayo de 1458, en Placé, Maine, Francia, a la edad de 71 años.
